name: Delicious Decimals
description: Add as many decimals as your hunger desires!

delicious-dial.name: Delicious Dial (DD)
delicious-dial.description:
Choose how your <cp>Delicious Decimals (DD)</c> behave.

<cj>Definitive</c>: The 'classic' mode. It directly uses your <cp>Delicious Decimals (DD)</c> input.

<cj>Dynamix</c>: Keeps your % in a constant place. This is noticeable with a larger <cp>Delicious Decimals (DD)</c>.
<cr>RISK</c>: With larger values, this will lag the game.

<cj>Deviation</c>: Sequentially adds more <cp>Delicious Decimals (DD)</c> to your screen based on <cp>Delicious Deviation Degree (DDD)</c>

delicious-decimals.name: Delicious Decimals (DD)
delicious-decimals.description:
The amount of <cp>Delicious Decimals (DD)</c> you want to display.

Min: 0

Max: This value will be limited to match your screen size when you open a level/close the mod Popup in the Pause Menu.

delicious-deviation-degree.name: Delicious Deviation Degree (DDD)
delicious-deviation-degree.description:
The rate of which the <cp>Delicious Decimals (DD)</c> increase

Ensure you enable the <cj>Distribution</c> in <cp>Delicious Dial (DD)</c> setting to use this feature.

Min: 0.1

Max: 100.0

defect-debug.name: Defect Debug (DD)
defect-debug.description:
0% bugfix. <cc>Defect Debug (DD)</c> is most noticeable when play testing a level not from 0%.

Your <cp>Delicious Decimals (DD)</c> (and progress bar) will be set to the correct percent in the level.
